plugins.name: skills-toolkit
plugins.description: Toolkit for authoring and validating Claude Code skills and agents. Adds agent-author for end-to-end build/edit/package, agent-validator citing marketplace-guidelines, plus 13 templates. Auto-invoke on 'create skill', 'validate agent', 'build agent'.

plugins.name: terminal-setup-macos
plugins.description: Idempotent macOS terminal installer for Ghostty, Oh My Zsh, Powerlevel10k, Glow, MesloLGS Nerd Font, plus optional markdown-preview kit (MacDown 3000, grip, entr, OSC 8 paths)

plugins.name: update-readme
plugins.description: Universal README updater. Scans target, classifies repo type (plugin, marketplace, library, monorepo), asks detail level, generates. Auto-invoke on 'update readme', 'refresh readme'. Skip Toast services, one-line edits, empty repos.
